name: Coupon: Redeem

description.en: Enter your discount coupon code at checkout. The redemption is recorded on-chain and the discount percentage is returned instantly.
description.de: Gib deinen Gutscheincode beim Bezahlen ein. Die Einlösung wird on-chain gespeichert und der Rabatt sofort zurückgegeben.
description.fr: Saisissez votre code promo au paiement. L'utilisation est enregistrée on-chain et le pourcentage de réduction est retourné instantanément.
description.es: Introduce tu código de descuento al pagar. El canje queda registrado on-chain y el porcentaje de descuento se devuelve al instante.
description.ro: Introdu codul tău de reducere la plată. Folosirea este înregistrată on-chain și procentul de reducere este returnat imediat.

bot: Redeems an on-chain coupon by code. Ask the user for the coupon code they want to apply. On success the contract returns the discount percentage.

inputs.name: Coupon Code

description.en: The coupon code to redeem (e.g. SUMMER20)
description.fr: Le code promo à utiliser (ex. SUMMER20)
description.es: El código del cupón a canjear (p. ej. SUMMER20)

inputs.bot: The exact coupon code — e.g. SUMMER20, VIP50. Case-sensitive.

success.en: {{DISCOUNT}}% off — coupon applied! Show this confirmation to the merchant.
success.de: {{DISCOUNT}}% Rabatt — Gutschein eingelöst! Zeig diese Bestätigung dem Händler.
success.fr: {{DISCOUNT}}% de réduction — coupon utilisé ! Montrez cette confirmation au marchand.
success.es: {{DISCOUNT}}% de descuento — ¡cupón aplicado! Muestra esta confirmación al comerciante.
success.ro: {{DISCOUNT}}% reducere — cupon folosit! Arată această confirmare comerciantului.
